notes: batch-D / app/src/settings/ai.rs / 60 entries. Breakdown: 35 translate (UI tooltips, display names, command-palette descriptions, settings descriptions) + 25 flag_panic_message (`.expect("Can parse ... regex")` strings in lazy_static! blocks at lines 588 and 602-628 — these are Regex::new(...).expect() panic strings per spec §10). No `#[cfg(test)]` test fixtures: the `cfg_if!` branch at L594-598 only has empty Vec literals, not the candidate strings. The candidates at L602-628 are in the NON-test branch (the production allowlist/denylist defaults). No `fn search_terms` returns in this file. Key glossary applications: Agent (kept English, per Glossary), Warp (kept), AWS/Bedrock (kept), `block` → 命令块, `prompt` → 提示词 (AI context), `tab` → 标签页, `pane` not present. `Cloud Oz` translated as `云端 Oz` (Oz brand-kept though glossary notes Oz was renamed to Orchestration; source still emits `Cloud Oz` so the label is preserved). Key names `Control`/`Shift` kept English (these are physical-key labels).
